title: Sound Feelings Toothbrush - Basic, KIDS, 4-Pack, Extra-Soft
description: Our kids plain toothbrush is perfect for little ones who are just learning to brush their teeth. The bristles are of the same stiffness as our “x-soft” adult model but instead of 47 tufts, they have just 24 tufts. Though we call it our “kids” brush, many adults actually like the control they have with the smaller cleaning surface that this brush provides. 4 toothbrushes per pack. This is NOT a flimsy "disposable" style toothbrush. It is a quality, x-soft-bristle toothbrush with a solid handle like you grew up with. All the bristles are at the same level for the most even cleaning capability. Compare to the older style GUM, Colgate and Just the Basics from CVS brands. No crazy "ergonomic" handles. No multi-color bristles. No varying-length bristles. No bent heads. Just a well-made classic toothbrush! Because the Sound Feelings toothbrush has a traditional flat top, it actually makes better surface contact with all surfaces within your mouth than "modern" multilevel brushes." All toothbrushes are INDIVIDUALLY-WRAPPED in cellophane for maximum sterility. Certified BPA-free, Phthalate-free. Please search on Amazon for ALL VERSIONS of our toothbrushes from Sound Feelings: Soft, Extra Soft, Medium, Hard, Extra-Hard and Kids, or Sampler, if you aren't sure.
features: Pack of 4 old-fashioned, classic toothbrushes for KIDS
End-rounded nylon bristles

24 tufts of X-SOFT bristles. Length 6.25" Red, Yellow, Green, Blue (colors may vary). Made in USA
This low-cost item not eligible for Prime

reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.title: Fits my electric toothbrush
reviews.text: Just like the original except the price.With the originals price keep going up, this is a very good alternative. shipping was quick.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

title: Oral-B iO Series 4 Electric Toothbrush with (1) Brush Head, Rechargeable, Black
description: The iO is Oral-B’s best technology: Clinically Proven 500% More Plaque Removal Along Gumline versus a manual toothbrush. The i04 coaches you to a perfect clean. This is real time personalized coaching. The accompanying App shows your daily brushing report. Having 4 Brush Modes (Daily Clean, Whiten, Sensitive, and Super Sensitive) Oral-B is on your team for your everyday brushing task. A Round head and gentle micro-vibrations, the Magnetic interaction delivers smooth, harmonious motion through a Synchronized cleaning action (micro-vibrations synced with oscillations). A Built-in-2-Minute Timer ensures an even easier experience, helping you get an optimal clean on all your teeth. The Oral-B's quadrant timer breaks the two minutes up into four 30-second intervals to clean each quadrant of your mouth; we keep the time, so you don’t have to. Delivering the perfect pressure is done by having a Pressure Sensor. The Pressure Sensor Indicates optimal cleaning pressure and warns of over pressure. With an accompanying travel case, you’ll have a fresh clean everywhere you go. We’re with you on your next trip or even your mid-day on-the go brushing! Best of all, it is brought to you by Oral-B—the #1 brand used by dentists worldwide.* *Based on surveys of a representative worldwide sample of dentists carried out for P&G regularly.Do not use on children under age 3. Replace brush (head) every 3 months or sooner if brush head becomes worn.
features: You will receive (1) Oral-B iO4 Electric Toothbrush, (1) Ultimate Clean Replacement Brush Head, and (1) Travel Case, and (1) charger
Clinically proven to remove 500% more plaque along the gumline vs. a regular manual toothbrush

Includes a 2 minute timer to ensure a complete clean
Pressure sensor indicates optimal cleaning pressure and warns of over pressure
Round head and gentle micro-vibrations

reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:43eb444c7fc5734c88e2c00c67e2f0fc]] Ordered these to brush my kids teeth. They help simplify the process of trying with a regular tooth brush at this time. Fits on fingers well. Soft and gentle on gums snd helps get teeth clean. Im satisfied.

reviews.title: Not for little babies
reviews.text: I can’t even fit these in my baby’s mouth. Maybe for when he gets older but by the time they’d fit, he’d be using a toothbrush

reviews.title: Perfect...For My Cats. :))
reviews.text: My vet advised me to brush my cats' teeth at least 3x a week. They haven't liked the typical toothbrushes used for this, so I decided to try these. They tolerate these brushes really well and even seem to enjoy the "massage" these brushes give them. I have two cats so it was great that these came in a two-pack so each gets their own toothbrush. They work well with the "cat toothpaste" I use and I haven't had any issues with the little silicone bristles coming off like the bristles on other types of toothbrushes. It slips over my finger and fits perfectly - just snug enough that I have good control, which is imperative for brushing pet teeth, and it also gives some protection in case of biting. This hasn't been an issue for me, since my cats are young and are used to having their teeth brushed at this point. The key to successful tooth brushing for cats is starting slow and being consistent. Glad to have found these, because they really do make the process a lot easier and I'm able to get the job done a lot faster and with less fuss from my fur babies. I'm also more confident that these can be kept cleaner than a typical toothbrush due to being made of silicone because the last thing you want is to spread more bacteria around! Would definitely buy these again when they wear out, but they seem durable enough that they will last for years.

title: oogiebear 360° Toothbrush - Training Toothbrush for Babies. Safe Ultra Soft Silicone Toothbrush with Teddy Bear Baby Gum Relief and Gum Massaging Base. Baby Must Haves. BPA Free
features: MAKES BRUSHING SAFE AND BEAR-ABLE - oogiebear’s adorable and innovative baby toothbrush provides better baby oral care and makes brushing tiny teeth fun with a soft bristle brush and bear head design that ensures it never goes in too deep.

FUN AND FUNCTIONAL DESIGN - oogiebear’s unique 360 degree toothbrush effectively cleans teeth and gums with short soft bristles. The soft silicone base is easy for baby to hold while premium grade silicone bumps stimulate gums.

BABY’S FIRST TOOTHBRUSH - Made for babies 3 months and older, oogiebear toothbrush is the perfect tool to get your baby used to brushing before graduating to their first big-kid toothbrush. Its stand-up base makes it easy to clean and store.

SUPERIOR QUALITY - oogiebear toothbrush is made with the highest quality food-grade silicone. Its extra-soft bristles are fun to chew and won’t break off or cause choking while its base has a silky touch that’s soothing to gums.

DOCTOR DESIGNED, MOM TESTED, PERIODONTIST APPROVED - Created by a registered pharmacist and mother and periodontist dad, oogiebear toothbrush is designed to make learning to brush easier for parents and baby for a lifetime of bright beautiful smiles.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: It was a gift
reviews.text: It was a gift to my nieces son. She said he loves it. He’s only 6 months but it’s never too early to teach. She said he won’t let it go.

reviews.title: Well designed kids toothbrush
reviews.text: Very useful toothbrush. I got it for my 8 month old who already has a few teeth. I love the design. It is relatively large, which makes it easier to my baby to hold and shew in. Since the brush is round, it works from all angles. I highly recommend it.

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.
features: EFFERVESCENT TOOTHPOWDER: Eco Dent tooth powder delivers a deep cleaning action to your mouth while neutralizing acids.
GENTLE TOOTH POWDER: Our low abrasion powder for cleaning teeth is gentle on enamel and may be used alone or sprinkled over toothpaste.
TIME-TESTED INGREDIENTS: Our original mint tooth powder contains baking soda, minerals, and essential oils to support your oral care needs and freshen your breath.
ECONOMICAL & LONG LASTING: Our travel size toothpaste powder is a convenient and economical oral care solution that lasts for up to 200 brushings.
PREMIUM ORAL CARE: Eco-Dent DailyCare Baking Soda Toothpowder is used and recommended by dentists, oral surgeons, and periodontists.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush
reviews.text: This is my second cybersonic toothbrush.  When my first cybersonic failed after many years of good service I ordered a less expensive name brand electric toothbrush and after 6 weeks threw it away and ordered my new cybersonic. Lesson learned.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text:
I've been using Cybersonic for decades. My teeth don't feel clean without it.
My second handle/rechargable battery needed replacing, so I decided to try the Cybersonic 3. I was surprised how much lighter it feels. And I think the oscillation is faster, but I didn't read up on it to check. Same great result - really clean teeth. The timing indicator isn't something I wanted/needed, but doesn't bother me. I has basically ignore it. Hope this handle lasts as long as my previous ones.
I really like the charging base. I discarded the side attachments to hold extra brushes and accessories, which left me with a sleek, minimalistic charging base.
So far I'm really happy with my purchase & highly recommend this product/brand/company.

reviews.title: Nice toothbrush covers!
reviews.text:
Love these toothbrush covers! The pastel colors are appealing and smooth feeling. Fits great over my electric toothbrush. A little expensive, but they’ve been worth it!

Will be buying more for replacements in the future.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect for any size tooth brush we own.

reviews.title: I prefer the flip top ones after trying these; these sometimes fly out of my fingers
reviews.text:
There are six claw-type toothbrush holders in this package. The colors are muted but nice. However, after trying these, I prefer the flip top holders better because they are more streamlined, have an air vent for drying the brush, and are easier to operate.

These look nice on the brush but there is no air vent. The only air circulation is through the bottom hole through which the handle feeds through. Also, the act of opening the clip is cumbersome. Sometimes these almost want to fly out of my hand. In addition, they flop around on the top of the brush and take up more space. For instance, if I had a six-toothbrush holder and wanted to cover the top of every brush, I really could not do that successfully with these because they are top large and would be hitting into each other.

Nevertheless, these do what they are supposed to do except they are not my favorite.

The current price of $17.99 is an expensive $3 per holder.

reviews.title: Expensive for what they are, but handy and easy to use
reviews.text:
I've bought travel clips like these in the past that were similar to these. They're pretty much tiny enclosed hair clips that go over your toothbrush. These are more compact than others I've used so they're pretty secure on the toothbrush and don't move around in my toiletries bag. They may dent your brush's bristles of you have a larger brush.

There isn't much to these, they are sturdy and cute, but I do think they're pretty pricy for what they are. Granted, you do get 6 in the pack and would likely not have to repurchase them if you don't lose them.

reviews.title: Fit our electric toothbrush heads well
reviews.text: Just what they say they are. They fit our electric toothbrush heads perfectly. Easy to open and close.

reviews.title: They’re ok…
reviews.text: Of the many compatible replacement heads I’ve tried, this set isn’t my favorite. It doesn’t feel as sturdy as some of the other brands I’ve tried, and rattles a bit. But it does work.

reviews.title: Make my Sonicare ineffective
reviews.text:
The toothbrush heads I received have yellow bristles in place of the advertised green. The color doesn’t matter much to me, but I’m curious if the yellow will work the way the green do and give an indication it’s time to change the brush head? Time will tell.

While I don’t mind the color, I do mind the fact that these brush heads don’t do the same sort of job brushing as do the name brand, or even other non-name brand replacements I’ve used. They fit on my Sonicare brush okay, but when I use it, it doesn’t vibrate nearly as fast or feel like it’s cleaning my teeth the way it should. While using it, I had to fight the urge to start brushing like I would with a manual toothbrush since I didn’t feel like it was doing much of anything to clean my teeth. My Sonicare seems sort of weak and ineffective with this head attached, and it’s not the Sonicare itself, because when I put the old brush head back on, it worked as expected.

reviews.title: Just as good as the name brand!
reviews.text: These replacement toothbrush heads are just as good as the Philips Sonicare ones I've bought in the past. If I closed my eyes I wouldn't know the difference. I'm definitely buying these again, plus they are close to half the price!

reviews.title: Functional And Sturdy
reviews.text: These replacement heads for Sonicare E-Series Toothbrushes arrived individually wrapped.  All of the plastic surfaces are smooth and finished.  The bristles are smooth.  They fit my Sonicare Essence perfectly, and screwed on to the handle easily.  The head of the brush is small, and fits into the back corners of my mouth easily.  They clean my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement heads, for a considerably lower price.  I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Best Sonicare Replacement Heads Yet!
reviews.text: To be fair, this is the second brand I've ever tried, but still, significantly better! Reason one, these are infinitely less expensive than the Up and Up brand replacements, I bought a few years ago. I only received 3 heads for $30, compared to the 6 I received with this brand for $20. Reason two is the fit. The Up and Up brand heads weren't a perfect fit and chattered like crazy whenever I used them, which was less than ideal. These new heads are as silent as the original Sonicare head was out of the box. If you need to switch out your old worn-out head, save yourself some time and money and give these a try.

reviews.title: If you have sensitive gums, buy this OEM Oral-B Toothbrush Head vs Chinese After-Market
reviews.text: My wife has sensitive gums.  These OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads are much softer but still do the job vs supposedly equivalent "sensitive" Chinese After-Market heads.  While the Chinese after-market toothbrush heads are much cheaper, they contributed to my wife's $2,000. gum surgery.  I swapped back to OEM Oral-B brush heads and all is now good for her.  Live and learn I guess or, better yet, you get what you pay for.  Buy these OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads with confidence.

features: U-shaped Brush Head: Ninety percent of children aged 2-7 years refuse to brush their teeth. The package comes with a replacement toothbrush, and the u-brush is gentle on the gums and enamel.

6 Automatic Cleaning Modes: Kids electric toothbrushes with up to 5000-20000Hz sonic vibration per minute for comprehensive cleaning of teeth. Can choose from the strong mode for powerful teeth brushing, Comfortable mode, among others. All the different modes are timed to make brushing for kids easy.

IPX7 Waterproof: Toddler electric toothbrush has IPX7 waterproof sealing design, the entire toothbrush can be rinsed with water, it also can be used in the shower. The toothbrush head is removable and replaceable. You can crop as needed.

title: Better & Better Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for Adults | Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush | Replaceable Bamboo Brush Heads w/Soft, Plant-Based Bristles | 5 Cleaning Modes & Long-Lasting Battery
features: A Cleaner Clean and Brighter, Whiter Smile - Improve your brushing routine with Better & Better’s Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for adults equipped with soft, natural, plant-based bristles made from castor bean oil. Our sonic toothbrush produces up to 38,000 microvibrations per minute for high polish and gentle clean. Choose from its 5 cleaning modes depending on your brushing needs.

Smart, Seamless & More Powerful Cleaning - Our bamboo electric toothbrush for adults features a 2-minute dentist-recommended timer with 30-second interval pulses. Flaunt your unique smile with the help of the sonic toothbrush's 5 cleaning modes: cleaning (default) for removing plaque, whitening for improving surface color, polishing mode for brightening your front teeth, milder for gentle gum massage, and sensitive for a super gentle mode for sensitive teeth and gums.

A Better Brushing Routine - The bamboo sonic toothbrush’s cleaning modes and plant-based bristles are safe to use on braces and dental restorations (fillings, crowns, veneers, or implants). Our electric toothbrush for adults is certified cruelty-free and comes in recyclable packaging.

Designed for Optimal Brushing Experience - Our bamboo electric sonic brush comes with replaceable bamboo heads. The entire brush is waterproof, so you can use it in the shower. The long-lasting and rechargeable battery also makes this the perfect travel toothbrush to keep your routine tip top on the go. You only need to charge it every 30-40 days when your routine consists of brushing twice, morning and night.

Better for You. Better for the Planet - We set out to make toothbrushes that are good in every way. Our unique natural bamboo brush heads create less waste when replaced. We prioritize the health of our bodies and our planet, which leads us to imagine entirely new ways of doing things. And as we minimize the ecological effects of our products and packaging, we create a better world.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush ever.
reviews.text:
I’ve used Sonicare Diamondclean for years - but after trying this one, I’ll never go back. It’s gentler, cleans better, and less than half the price of Diamondclean. I love the bamboo, the soft bristles. The only thing I wish it had two buttons (one for on/off, one for the settings), and a wireless induction charging base.
But as is I still love it.

reviews.title: Bamboo sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Good, sonic (vibrations rather than spinning) toothbrush. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. It comes with only 2 replacement heads which deducts a star as I expect at least 4. It does comes with a toothbrush holder stand to recharge with a 30-40 day battery life. Many of these brushes only come with a ubs cable, so the included toothbrush holder is a great addition. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. This toothbrush is unique as it is made with bamboo making it a more natural product!

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Way too small…

That would have been fine but the toothbrush head is so tiny, I appreciate that these are compostable but I just feel like this could have been done better. The packaging seems great, however these arrived in a plastic Amazon bag, so it sort cancel’s out the intention. So I’m a little disappointed and will unfortunately bring my plastic traveling toothbrush just incase this one doesn’t work for me. So tiny for a 6 day trip! I won’t use the pills, I just bought these for the compostable toothbrushes, so I can’t really comment on those.

title: Oral-B Pulsar Battery Toothbrush With Charcoal Infused Bristles, Soft
description: Oral B Pulsar charcoal infused toothbrush is battery operated to gently vibrate and polish away stains for a whiter, cleaner smile. Using the same technique to brush as a manual toothbrush, The bristles vibrate providing a gentle massaging and polishing action while brushing. The bristles penetrate between teeth where stain build-up often begins. Pulsar has soft vibrating bristles that help break up plaque between teeth. Plus, the split head design moderates the amount of pressure applied to your teeth and gums. Contouring to your unique smile, The Pulsar toothbrush will leave your smile bright and clean with every use.
features: You will receive 1 Oral-B Pulsar battery toothbrush with charcoal infused bristles, battery included
The Charcoal infused bristles gently vibrate to effectively clean plaque and remove surface stains for whiter teeth
Penetrates deep between teeth and hard-to-reach areas of the mouth to sweep away plaque and stains caused by Food

reviews.title: Weak vibration
reviews.text: Not the best

reviews.title: Great Product!
reviews.text: Great Product!

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I always use the Oral B battery toothbrushes - I’m over 80, with my original teeth, and this toothbrush has kept me in good shape for years.  I like that they remind me to get a new about every three months.  The charcoal one helps to keep my teeth as white as they can be at this age - no taste involved - just mixes with your toothpaste and it does a great job.  I also find that this toothbrush brushes my gums, too, and I have not had any bleeding gums in years.  This is the only toothbrush I will buy.

reviews.title: Clean Those Teeth
reviews.text:
I love this electric tooth brush, by Oral-B as it is so different from ones I have tried before. I thought I would have to insert the battery but to my surprise it was already inserted and ready to be used. It was so easy and the button you need to push is clearly marked with a + so you push that and you are ready to add toothpaste and brush away. Just push the – sign and it stops. That was so easy and fast and you got a good brushing of your teeth. The bristles are charcoal infused bristle and this adds to completely clean your teeth and makes them feel clean.

I am wondering what one has to do if battery is used up as could not figure out where to change a battery. There was not that much explanations but I am enjoying the use of this great Oral-B for a great battery tooth brush. Great way to start the day with an Oral-B electric tooth cleaning.
